summary: There is insufficient evidence demonstrating that novel surgical approaches improve access or reduce complications compared to traditional TMJ procedures; most literature emphasizes non-surgical management as effective for over 85-90% of patients. Therefore, such innovations have not been proven clinically superior based on current research findings.
